---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature for the Bash Utils library
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Is your feature request related to a problem?
Describe the problem you are trying to solve.

Example:

> I'm always frustrated when I need to manually validate environment variables in multiple scripts.

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like to see.

Explain what the new feature should do and how it should behave.

---

## Example Usage

If possible, provide a simple example of how the feature could be used.

```bash
# Example
source bash-utils.sh

env_bool DEBUG_MODE
ansi_red "Error occurred"
str_shorten 10 "Very long string value"
```

This helps maintainers understand the expected behavior and API design.

---

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

---

## Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, or screenshots that might help explain the request.
